element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Climbing out of pond after teleportation; low stakes environmental navigation
Lester can kick at small creatures while unarmed; teaches basic combat approach
Contact with animals and environmental hazards causes instant death; teaches respect for environment
Cooperative escape; introduces allied NPC mechanics; Buddy can also die instantly
Three modes: standard fire, force field blocks, charged shots; teaches enemy weapon symmetry
Defensive application; blocks enemy fire; requires understanding enemy capabilities
Breaks through force fields and some walls; puzzle and combat application
Armed enemies with same weapon capabilities; requires tactical positioning

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mid-game - 'situation-specific actions' such as rocking cages
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Context-sensitive actions required; teaches environmental problem-solving
Complex navigation; combines movement, hazards, and enemy encounters
Vertical progression; climax encounter; final boss-like confrontation
Only time HUD appears (oxygen bar); teaches resource management under pressure

typical_relief_triggers: Safe zone or momentary safety after hazard
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cinematic tension through one-hit-death stakes; regular checkpoint placement creates rhythm of risk and respawn; escalating difficulty from unarmed evasion to tactical combat; climax intensified by Lester's wounded state

difficulty_curve.early_game: Low-stakes environmental navigation as unarmed Lester; learn movement and basic evasion from small creatures
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Acquisition of laser pistol; introduction to three weapon modes; prison complex navigation with humanoid enemies; puzzle-solving with allied Buddy; increasing environmental complexity (caves, varied terrain)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Tower structure final ascent; enemies with equal weapon capabilities; Lester wounded during climax; requires mastery of all weapon modes and tactical positioning

notable_level_patterns.description: Initial pond climbing sequence teaches basic movement and establishes alien world atmosphere without combat
Early game relies on avoiding rather than fighting; small creatures can be kicked but larger threats require running and environmental awareness
Introduction of Buddy as ally; cooperative navigation through dangerous facility; teaches two-character coordination where either death = restart
Enemies use identical laser pistol with all three modes; player must learn defensive (force field) and offensive (charged shot) applications
Tower structure final segment with escalating stakes; Lester wounded; culminates in escape on dragon-like creature
